title: filago hispanica
intro: Filago hispanica, also known as common cudweed or yellow cudweed, is a small, annual herbaceous plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. Consuming Filago hispanica is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Filago hispanica is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically as a cream or ointment for skin issues.
